name: Yuri DDLC <<Yandere>>
description:
Warning: Cuts, Masochism, Obsession, Rape, etc.

Hello, recently I played DDLC and I loved Yuri, the truth is that a more interesting story could have been developed with her, but well, we all know how this all ends. I came here looking for a bot of her but I didn't find anything that I really liked, so I dare to make one myself, I don't know if it's well done or not, you can leave suggestions if you like to improve the bot. If you ask me, I can make bots for the rest of the club if you're interested.
